pattern.imageEvidence: beverage attendant garnishing mocktails at a citrus cart with glassware and herbs
pattern.styleContract: Fresh and inclusive with guest-service proof, real mocktail cart evidence, citrus action accents, and garnish menu cards as the signature move.

tagline: A beverage cart with zero boring sips.

hero.title: SpritzLoop mocktail beverage cart hero image
hero.alt: A beverage attendant garnishing colorful mocktails at a compact cart with citrus, herbs, and glassware.

contact.serviceArea: Mocktail carts, zero-proof bars, citrus spritz service, shower beverages, corporate refreshment carts, graduation parties, weddings, birthdays, and private events across the metro

copy.heroTitle: A bar cart that keeps every guest in the toast.
copy.heroText: SpritzLoop brings zero-proof drinks, citrus, herbs, glassware, garnish prep, and a tidy cart setup for events that want the fun without leaning on alcohol.
copy.introTitle: The garnish is cute. The service plan matters.
copy.introText: We match drink styles, guest count, glassware needs, service timing, power or water access, and whether the cart is hosted or self-serve.
copy.proofTitle: Fresh proof before the first pour
copy.quoteText: Send the date, location, guest count, drink vibe, and service window. We will suggest the right cart package and garnish plan.

services.title: Spritz Cart
services.text: A hosted cart with citrus-forward mocktails, garnish prep, glassware notes, and a cheerful service rhythm.

services.title: Batch And Pour
services.text: Prepped zero-proof drinks served cleanly for showers, offices, and open-house style events.

services.title: Signature Sip Menu
services.text: Two or three custom flavors, garnish styling, and a menu flow built around the guest count.

process.title: Pick the drink vibe
process.text: Fresh, herbal, bright, cozy, or celebratory notes help us shape the menu.

process.title: Plan the cart
process.text: Guest count, service time, power, ice, glassware, and location access get confirmed.

process.title: Serve and reset
process.text: We garnish, pour, replenish, tidy the cart, and hand off leftovers or batch notes.

proof.label: setup needs confirmed before event day
